</span>              <span data-view-component="true">
  <clipboard-copy role="menuitem" value="# What does this PR do?

This PR refactors `forced_decoder_ids` making sure that we now always pass prompted ids as `decoder_input_ids` into generate for Whisper. The whole idea of forcing ids instead of just passing them as initial tokens was a bad design choice and we should try to move away from it.

In addition, Whisper prompting is improved by:
- Not allowing `prompt_ids` to be passed as a numpy array
- Enable `prompt_ids` for long-form generation with two modes:
  - a) prompt only the first segment
  - b) prompt every segment

While a) is the only supported case in the original Whisper repo b) can be very useful as can be seen in the added slow test [here](https://github.com/huggingface/transformers/pull/28687/files#r1467376608).


This is the final code PR regarding Whisper for Transformers. In the next weeks focus will be put on writing nice docs, tutorials and blog posts." data-view-component="true" class="dropdown-item btn-link" tabindex="0">

    <div class="comment-body markdown-body js-comment-body soft-wrap user-select-contain d-block">
      <h1 dir="auto">What does this PR do?</h1>
<p dir="auto">This PR refactors <code class="notranslate">forced_decoder_ids</code> making sure that we now always pass prompted ids as <code class="notranslate">decoder_input_ids</code> into generate for Whisper. The whole idea of forcing ids instead of just passing them as initial tokens was a bad design choice and we should try to move away from it.</p>
<p dir="auto">In addition, Whisper prompting is improved by:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Not allowing <code class="notranslate">prompt_ids</code> to be passed as a numpy array</li>
<li>Enable <code class="notranslate">prompt_ids</code> for long-form generation with two modes:
<ul dir="auto">
<li>a) prompt only the first segment</li>
<li>b) prompt every segment</li>
</ul>
</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">While a) is the only supported case in the original Whisper repo b) can be very useful as can be seen in the added slow test <a href="https://github.com/huggingface/transformers/pull/28687/files#r1467376608">here</a>.</p>
<p dir="auto">This is the final code PR regarding Whisper for Transformers. In the next weeks focus will be put on writing nice docs, tutorials and blog posts.</p>
    </div>
  </task-lists>
  
</div>

  <task-lists disabled="" sortable="">
    <div class="comment-body markdown-body js-comment-body soft-wrap user-select-contain d-block css-overflow-wrap-anywhere">
      <p dir="auto">Previously we allowed passing numpy arrays into <code class="notranslate">model.generate(...)</code> which I think was not intentional and a bug (see here: <a href="https://github.com/huggingface/transformers/pull/22496/files#r1467370182">https://github.com/huggingface/transformers/pull/22496/files#r1467370182</a>).</p>
<p dir="auto">If people feel strongly I can make it backward compatible though inside generate, but we should definitely not allow passing numpy arrays into a nn.Module</p>
    </div>
  </task-lists>
  

</div>

    </div>
